cache_read_tokens.description: Provider-native prompt-cache READ tokens, for additive metering. NOT guaranteed additive to input_tokens: provider-one (OpenAI) folds cached tokens INTO input_tokens/total (a subset), provider-two (Anthropic) reports them DISJOINT from input_tokens and the derived total EXCLUDES them. A biller must apply the per-provider convention, not assume one — and Reservation.MaxTotalTokens meters total_tokens, so a family that reports cache tokens disjointly does not count them toward the cap.

cache_write_tokens.description: Provider-native prompt-cache WRITE (creation) tokens, for additive metering. Reported disjoint by provider-two (Anthropic cache_creation_input_tokens, billed at a premium); provider-one has no explicit write count (0). Same additivity caveat as cache_read_tokens.
